query:
SELECT r.id, r.slug, r.name, r.shortDesc, r.cuisine, r.heroImage, r.badge, r.acceptsOnlineBooking, r.isActive,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rs.name, ' ', rs.startTime, '-', rs.endTime) ORDER BY rs.sortOrder SEPARATOR ' | ') AS shifts
FROM restaurants r
LEFT JOIN restaurant_shifts rs ON rs.restaurantId = r.id AND rs.isActive = 1
WHERE r.isActive = 1
GROUP BY r.id
ORDER BY r.sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute 
SELECT r.id, r.slug, r.name, r.shortDesc, r.cuisine, r.heroImage, r.badge, r.acceptsOnlineBooking, r.isActive,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(rs.name, ' ', rs.startTime, '-', rs.endTime) ORDER BY rs.sortOrder SEPARATOR ' | ') AS shifts
FROM restaurants r
LEFT JOIN restaurant_shifts rs ON rs.restaurantId = r.id AND rs.isActive = 1
WHERE r.isActive = 1
GROUP BY r.id
ORDER BY r.sortOrder;
